employees_code_active_unique.name: employees_code_active_unique
employees_code_active_unique.where: status = 'ACTIVE' AND employee_code IS NOT NULL

read_material_recommendations_active_pro.name: read_material_recommendations_active_product_unique
read_material_recommendations_active_pro.where: product_id IS NOT NULL AND acknowledged_at IS NULL AND dismissed_at IS NULL AND superseded_by IS NULL

read_material_recommendations_active_mat.name: read_material_recommendations_active_material_unique
read_material_recommendations_active_mat.where: product_id IS NULL AND acknowledged_at IS NULL AND dismissed_at IS NULL AND superseded_by IS NULL

read_operator_daily_day_code_legacy_uniq.name: read_operator_daily_day_code_legacy_unique
read_operator_daily_day_code_legacy_uniq.where: employee_id IS NULL AND operator_code IS NOT NULL
